subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! This is a breeze from amongst the fragrant breezes of the garden of meaning; unto Thee hath she turned on a day when the learned men of Thine age
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه نفحه من نفحات حدیقه المعانی قد اقبلت الیک فی یوم فیه اعرض علماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
